title: Steamvalley
description: A Create-based modpack with other mods such as BetterCombat, Simply Swords, Lootr and a lot more!
body:
![steamvalley](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/62c5e59978924aa76c4d5b74c3142ce197329471.png)
# Welcome to Steamvalley!

Steamvalley is a **create-based** modpack with other mods such as **BetterCombat**, **Lootr**, **Simply Swords** and a lot more!

## Explore Steamvalley features:
- **Play with your friends using e4mc!**


```
Open to LAN a singleplayer world and share the IP to your friends with this open-source mod!
```

- **Have fun with Create and addons!**


```
This modpack contains 15 Create addons for an everlasting fun!
```

- **Explore and find unique weapons in singleplayer/multiplayer**


```
Find every Simply Swords unique swords in structure chests!
But don't worry, with Lootr, every chests are unique per players!
```

- **Enjoy Minecraft!**


```
With Sodium, Lithium and Iris enjoy the integrated shader without using all your performances!
```

## Don't forget to [join the discord]([https://discord.gg/AdDkBRbvNq](https://discord.gg/AdDkBRbvNq)), that's important! :D
